query: SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(primaryDomain, '-', 1) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain REGEXP '^[a-z_]+-[0-9]{13}' GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(primaryDomain, '-', 1) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain REGEXP '^[a-z_]+-[0-9]{13}' GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC;
